popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description:
Thomas Holland, 2nd Earl of Kent, 3rd Baron Holand (1350 – 25 April 1397) was an English nobleman and a councilor of his half-brother Richard II.

Thomas was the son of Thomas Holland, 1st Earl of Ken …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent於1350年出生在英國藍卡爾武普 霍蘭時，他的父親Sir Thomas Holand37歲，母親Joan of Kent24歲。他於1369年與Alice FitzAlan在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1381年被列為2nd earl of kent。他去世於1397年4月25日在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素享年47歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾包恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent于1350年出生在英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Holand37岁，母亲Joan of Kent24岁。他于1369年与Alice FitzAlan在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1381年被列为2nd earl of kent。他去世于1397年4月25日在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素享年47岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾包恩。

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Howland
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent was born in 1350, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Holand, was 37 and his mother, Joan of Kent, was 24. He married Alice FitzAlan in 1369, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. In 1381, his occupation is listed as 2nd earl of kent. He died on 25 April 1397, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent est né en 1350, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Holand, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan of Kent, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alice FitzAlan en 1369, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. En 1381, sa profession de son indiquée est 2nd earl of kent. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1397, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Bourne, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent 1350 in Up Holland, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Holand 37 und seine Mutter Joan of Kent 24. Er hat 1369 in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England Alice FitzAlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1381 ist sein Beruf als 2nd earl of kent aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. April 1397 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England und wurde in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent è nato il nel 1350 nel Up Holland, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Holand, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Joan of Kent, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alice FitzAlan nel 1369, nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Nel 1381, la sua occupazione è indicata come 2nd earl of kent. Morì il 25 aprile 1397, nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Bourne, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kentが1350年にイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Holandは37歳，母Joan of Kentは24歳であった。1369年にイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルでAlice FitzAlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。1381年，職業は2nd earl of kentと記録されている。彼は1397年4月25日にイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルで47歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent(이)가 1350년 영국 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Holand(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan of Kent(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1369년 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 Alice FitzAlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1381년, 그의 직업은 2nd earl of kent이었다. 그는 1397년 4월 25일 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 본에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent nasceu em 1350, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Holand, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joan of Kent, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice FitzAlan em 1369, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Em 1381, sua profissão aparece como 2nd earl of kent. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1397, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent родился в 1350 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Holand было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan of Kent, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice FitzAlan в 1369 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. В 1381 году он работал по профессии 2nd earl of kent. Он умер 25 апреля 1397 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности бурн, линколншир, Англия.

sm.From 1381 to 1397: mai le 1381 e o'o I le 1397

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent nació en 1350, en Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Holand, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Joan of Kent, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alice FitzAlan en 1369, en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. En 1381, su ocupación registrada era 2nd earl of kent. Murió el 25 de abril de 1397, en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
